name: PixelOver
short_description: PixelOver is a pixel art animation tool that transforms your artwork into pixel-perfect renders. Animate in real time with keyframes, bones, inverse kinematics, and pixel-accurate transforms for pixel perfect sprites, GIFs, and spritesheets.
detailed_description:
Pixel art animation software

PixelOver is a pixel art oriented animation tool designed to turn your artwork into clean, pixel-perfect renders. Use real-time effects like dithering and indexation, then animate with keyframes and bones while keeping clean results thanks to pixel-art resampling.

Main features

  • Import images, GIFs, and 3D models
  • Layer-based workflow with pixel-art effects: indexation, dithering, pixel-perfect lines, color cycling, and more
  • Parent-child transform system for building clean hierarchies
  • Real-time animation with keyframes and bone rigging
  • Inverse kinematics (IK) for faster posing and character animation
  • Mesh deformation for flexible 2D animation and advanced rigs
  • Export to images, GIFs, or spritesheets

supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
